name: Sour Cream Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the self-rising flour and baking soda.
2. Add the sour cream and vegetable oil to the dry ingredients. Stir gently until just moistened.
3. Turn the mixture onto a floured surface. Knead 4-6 times.
4. Roll out the dough to a thickness of 3/4 inch.
5. Cut with a 2 1/2-inch biscuit cutter.
6. Place on a greased baking sheet.
7. Lightly spray the tops with nonstick cooking spray.
8. Bake at 425 degrees Fahrenheit for 10-12 minutes, or until golden brown.
Yield: 4 biscuits.
